caption: A man with a tall, silver-grey pompadour hairstyle, glasses, and a white collared shirt with a red bowtie is recording a podcast in a room filled with framed pictures and clothing displays. He wears black headphones and sits behind a professional microphone. In the background, a mannequin wears a black vest, and various framed photographs adorn the wall. On-screen text appears in the lower portion of the frame, stating "WHOLE LOTTA WOOD SH*T" in white and "BOSS TALK 101" in red. Logos for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" are visible on the microphone wind-screen and as a graphic overlay. As the sequence progresses, the man's facial expression shifts from a neutral, focused look to a slight smile, though his posture and position remain largely static.
